scope: Project-level reusable Bai Yi / 白翳 multi-state character identity board.

Qingming upper-intelligence insect hierarchy and wardrobe handoff

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems or create a new Bai Yi crest.
Use the locked Suming / Qingming emblem only as institutional usage on robe, collar, white-register, wax seal, or back seal.
Bai Yi must read as a highly human-like upper-intelligence insectoid official, not an ugly insect head, skull mask, or human wearing a mask.
No human hair and no ordinary human pupils; his near-human face should keep dark compound eyes.
Preserve Bai Yi's over-2-meter height, extremely slender vertical body, elongated hands, and restrained insect-caste body language.
Preserve the Qingming palette: insect-wax white, bone white, pearl grey, black sun, cold gold, translucent wing membrane, dark compound-eye black, and tiny dry-blood red only at needle risk points.
The pursuit state remains official and white, not black armor or lower-tier combat insect anatomy.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
